content.en:
"Go back!"

Ye Tian returned to the Terran territory with the Yang Dragon True Monarch.

Subsequently, Ye Tian summoned the high-level members of the human race to inquire about the specific situation of the matter.

"Husband, there are many true monarchs in the Terran territory at present, all of them are very powerful, we dare not offend these true monarchs rashly, and that ruin is also secretly surrounded by a group of true monarchs!"

Xiao Yue said.

"What's going on with that ruin, what's inside?" Ye Tian asked again.

He hadn't entered the mysterious place where the ruins were suspected to be, and Yanglong Zhenjun couldn't get in, all the news depended on inquiry, plus Yanglong Zhenjun was not a human race, so he definitely didn't know more about the situation than the high-level of the human race.

Kunwu Zhenjun said: "Wanfa Daozi, the specific situation is only known to those Terran members who have entered the ruins, I will ask a divine general who has entered the ruins to tell Daozi the situation carefully!"

Immediately, a Terran genius at the level of a seven-star god general came in.

"I've seen His Royal Highness the Ten Thousand Laws Daozi, and I've seen the True Monarchs!"

Yuan Gang, a genius of the human race, bent down and said respectfully.

"Yuan Gang, you have entered that mysterious place, what is the specific situation inside?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Your Highness, it should be a ruin, but that ruin is not big, there are only a few buildings, and it is very dilapidated, there is a huge blood-colored pool in one of the buildings, I have entered the blood-colored pool to cultivate, and the blood-colored pool can transform my body, make my body stronger, and improve my potential a lot. "

Yuan Gang replied seriously.

"Anything else?"

Ye Tian continued to ask.

"There is also a building, although it is dilapidated, but many areas inside are shrouded in formations, at that time, I was only at the level of the galaxy, and I couldn't shake the slightest trace of the formation, and the powerhouses above the cosmic god couldn't enter, so there was no way to enter that building, so I didn't know what was there!"

After Yuan Gang finished speaking, he took out a black iron piece from the universe in his body, and said: "Your Highness, this is a thing I got from that ruin, it is very tough, even now I can't destroy it in the slightest, I don't know what it is, maybe Your Highness can recognize it!"

"I'll see!"

Ye Tian took the iron piece over and examined it carefully.

"There is a ban!"

Ye Tian quickly sensed it, so a powerful divine soul power invaded the inside of this piece of iron.

In the eyes of everyone, this piece of iron trembled and emitted a black light.

At the same time, a powerful coercion emanated, making everyone involuntarily start to retreat, and even opened the formation to prevent being injured by this force.

"Don't worry, it's not a terrible weapon, it should just be an identity token!"

Ye Tian's voice reached everyone's ears, making them breathe a sigh of relief.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's divine soul power completely broke the prohibition, controlled the inside of this piece of iron, and controlled part of the internal prohibition.

However, due to Ye Tian's strong invasion, many functions of this token are basically abandoned.

However, some of the remaining information inside still let Ye Tian know the true origin of this token.

"Black Wind Mountain, Boss Waist Order!"

Judging from the remnants, this Black Wind Mountain should be a relatively powerful force, and the Boss Waist Order should only be the token of a small leader in Black Wind Mountain.

"That ruin should be part of the Black Wind Mountain, but I don't know what the blood pool is?"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Immediately, he introduced to everyone: "This is a waist order, which is equivalent to an identity token, and it is the token of the small boss of Black Wind Mountain, but we don't know what kind of force Black Wind Mountain belongs to." "

"Identity tokens, that's useless!"

One by one, the Terran higher-ups were disappointed.

If it is a heritage token, it has a lot of value, but it is only an identity token, and it is not useful at all.

"No, there are still some uses, I may be able to contact the formation of Black Wind Mountain from this identity token, so as to communicate with Black Wind Mountain, that is, I can enter that ruin. Once successful, maybe you can let the powerhouses above the cosmic god enter that ruin, and even directly take out that blood pool!"

Ye Tian said.

Saying this, the high-level Terran people were moved.

If you get that blood pool, the strength of the human race will definitely skyrocket!

Of course, if the blood pool is really taken out, the human race will inevitably bear the pressure of the outside world, and may not be able to keep the blood pool.

It may be safest to keep the blood pool in the ruins all the time, but then the Terrans will not be able to use the blood pool completely.

Because that ruin is not open all the time, but once in a hundred years, and there is a limit to the number of people, otherwise, there would be countless geniuses of the human race.

And now, it's only ten years away from the next opening.

Ten years later, the ruins will be opened, and other top powers will probably send a large number of galaxy-level into it to cultivate a group of geniuses.

After the meeting.

Ye Tian went to the Time True Tower with the waist order, and used 10,000 times the time to speed up, and began to study this piece of waist order.

Gradually, Ye Tian became more and more thorough about the prohibition and formation on the waist order, and the simple waist order also contained a lot of information and a new prohibition system.

It can be said that this piece of waist order allowed Ye Tian to step into a new realm.

"This waist order is not simple, just a token is so complicated, Black Wind Mountain is estimated to be many times stronger than the Heavenly Ape Sect!" Ye Tian guessed.

Ten years in the outside world, 100,000 years inside the real tower.

Ye Tian had studied for so long, and finally thoroughly studied most of the formations on this piece of waist order.

"It's time to go back!"

Ye Tian left the Time True Tower and returned to the Terran territory, and then urged a broken information contact formation on the waist order.

Rumble!!!!

In the dark, a huge formation was connected to the broken formation on the waist order, and Ye Tian instantly grasped this connection and sensed the position of that huge formation.

There is no such thing as time and space, but it is out of boundaries.

Click!

The connection was broken, and Ye Tian could no longer sense the space where that formation was located.

"If you want to rely on this piece of waist order to cross the space and enter there, it is really difficult and difficult, but it is not hopeless, but it will take a long time!"

Ye Tian muttered.

And how to deal with the ownership of this ruin at the moment is the key.

Only by completely occupying this ruin can he slowly study it.

"Go to the entrance of the ruins first, no matter what, this ruin is our human territory, and from the outside world, the value of this ruin is still far inferior to the ruins of the Heavenly Ape Sect, after all, it is only to allow the development of the creatures at the galaxy level and below, for those true monarchs, this ruin is of little value, so it will not go all out to compete!"

Ye Tian thought.

Therefore, it is still relatively possible for him to monopolize this ruin, but other forces must be deterred.

It can be said that he must have a big battle with other forces!
